name: apiRequest
description: This event is triggered before the user client sends an api request.

name: apiResponse
description: This event is triggered after the user client sent api request has received a response.

name: debug
description: This event is triggered when the user client sends debug information.

name: messageCreate
description: This event is triggered when the user client receives a message.

name: ready
description: This event is triggered when the user client is ready.
